name_en: 👄FENDI New Fendi First patent leather bag, suitable for daily wear, imported brown patent leather material, with matching large metal F clasp. Interior pocket lined with iconic FF pattern fabric, with removable inner hook and silver metal hardware. Comes with removable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Model: FD8137, Dimensions: 30*14*20cm
